fato_historico: 1910: In his book Clinical Psychiatry, Emil Kraepelin gives a name to Alzheimer's disease, naming it after his colleague Alois Alzheimer.
energia_do_dia: The stars invite you to honor the beauty of remembrance and the stories that define us. Just as names give shape to our understanding of the human journey, today is a beautiful time to define your own path with grace. Consider reflecting on your legacy, letting four-leaf clovers of wisdom guide you toward deeper self-awareness and peace.
frase_do_dia: Your memories are the foundation upon which your beautiful future is currently being built.
significado_numero: Represents the manifestation of harmony and balance within your personal life.
conselho: Take time to appreciate the meaningful connections that shape your unique identity today.
